findings.message: MCP config routes all tool calls through external server https://xquik.com/mcp via streamable-http; API key injected per user config
Missing `name` field in frontmatter; slash-command registration fails without it
Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs at least `xquik` and `explore` MCP tools
Command has at least four sequential steps (confirm, check account, post, show result) but none are numbered
Missing `name` field in frontmatter; slash-command registration fails without it
Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs `xquik` MCP tool
Missing `name` field in frontmatter; slash-command registration fails without it
Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs `xquik` MCP tool
Missing `name` field in frontmatter; slash-command registration fails without it
Command file declares no `allowed-tools`; needs `xquik` MCP tool
devDependency `@tanstack/intent` pinned to `"latest"` — resolves to a moving target on each install, creating a supply-chain risk for package maintainers
`prepublishOnly` lifecycle script runs `node scripts/check-versions.mjs`; script is a read-only version-drift checker with no network calls or shell exec
Endpoint row shows `GET /x/tweets/search?sort=top&min_faves=5000`; the sort mode parameter is `queryType=Top`, not `sort=top`
Endpoint table shows `sort=top` for search endpoint; search-tweets SKILL.md documents the correct parameter as `queryType=Top`
Uses `tool=post_extractor` in extraction code example; correct key is `toolType` as documented by every other skill in the repo
Example uses `?limit=50&sort=top` on GET /x/users/{id}/tweets; user-tweets SKILL.md explicitly states `limit` and `sort` are not supported by this endpoint
Uses `tool=post_extractor` while every other skill in the repo uses `toolType`; contradicts user-tweets, extract-followers, who-retweeted, and all other extraction skills
Missing `name` field in frontmatter; slash-command registration fails without it
